elements.title: Carmen Alfaro Asins
elements.contents: ... that Carmen Alfaro Asins (pictured) discovered a previously unknown Punic mint by comparing a coin inscription to an 11th-century tablet?

elements.title: Annida
elements.contents: ... that the magazine Annida refused to hire smokers for its cover shoots?

elements.title: Master of Walters 219
elements.contents: ... that art historian Millard Meiss claimed that the Master of Walters 219 was "one of the first artists to show a skeleton riding a bull"?

elements.title: Pacific Marine Mammal Center
elements.contents: ... that lungworms led to the creation of the Pacific Marine Mammal Center?

elements.title: Monuments
elements.contents: ... that the exhibition Monuments displays decommissioned Confederate statues alongside contemporary art?

elements.title: Tyren Montgomery
elements.contents: ... that Tyren Montgomery went from flag football player to NFL draft prospect?

elements.title: Djauhari Oratmangun
elements.contents: ... that Djauhari Oratmangun successfully pressured the Dutch government to change its recognition of Indonesia's independence date?

elements.title: Port Manatee Railroad
elements.contents: ... that the Port Manatee Railroad has carried lumber, fertilizer, and, at one point, a circus train?

elements.title: r/bald
elements.contents: ... that in r/bald, commenters tell posters to shave their heads with an anime meme?
